one_line: Capitulation bounce, not confirmed accumulation — volume spike after 52w low reads as short-covering exhaustion, not smart-money entry
evidence: RSI 20.5 and 52w-low print create the QUIET_ACCUM precondition (max pessimism, orphaned micro-cap), but no positive accumulation signal exists in this data: 108.4% institutional figure is a stale-float artifact from shares-outstanding shrinkage, not new buying; 6.82% SI is elevated for a wind-down, indicating active shorts remain present rather than exiting in bulk; the +12.3%/2.4x-volume bounce after a fresh 52w low is the classic short-covering signature, not deliberate NAV-arb accumulation (no follow-through data, no dark-pool prints, no 13F delta). No options flow to confirm directional conviction. Retail attention minimal with no catalyst. Verdict: NEUTRAL at the QUIET_ACCUM boundary — the setup is structurally ripe but the evidence package shows abandonment, not accumulation; upgrade to QUIET_ACCUM only on follow-through volume or 13F confirmation of new institutional positions.
